tasks.title: Utility Undergrounding (PG&E + SFPUC)
tasks.contractorHistory: Completed 2 of 4 SF Public Works projects on time. 2 projects delayed average 4 weeks each. Under SF Controller review for Polk Street change order dispute. Pre-flagged for close monitoring.
tasks.flagReason: Undocumented SFPUC water main discovered during Block C excavation in Month 10. Emergency repair required. Budget impact: +$4,000,000. DPW General Contractors LLC issued formal warning for incomplete utility survey.

tasks.title: Signage + Road Markings + Bus Shelters
tasks.contractorHistory: First project over $5M in SF Public Works database. Enhanced documentation and oversight required per SF Admin Code 6.20. Procurement file under Watchdog review. Board of Supervisors approval obtained.
